creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 214092
svn diff changes MASTER_SITES TIMESTAMP SHA256 SIZE WWW

This port is marked BROKEN for lack of working MASTER_SITES.
This pr(1) fixes that by providing the correct pointer to
MASTER_SITES.

According to their page on SourceForge. They moved
everything, as SF doesn't provide Fossil. They now
host their own source.

CHANGES

Makefile
MASTER_SITES

distinfo
TIMESTAMP
SHA256
SIZE

pkg-descr
WWW

That's it. Thanks!

P.S. version 2.2 is out
will save upgrade for another pr after I've tested it.
